pub fn identity (domain : Option < [f64 ; 2] > , window : Option < [f64 ; 2] > ,) -> Result < Self , FerrayError >
pub fn integ_with_bounds (& self , m : usize , k : & [f64] , lbnd : f64 , scl : f64 ,) -> Result < Self , FerrayError >

pub fn with_domain (mut self , domain : [f64 ; 2]) -> Result < Self , FerrayError >
pub fn with_window (mut self , window : [f64 ; 2]) -> Result < Self , FerrayError >

pub fn integ (& self , m : usize , k : & [Complex < f64 >]) -> Self
pub fn mul (& self , other : & Self) -> Self
pub fn new (coeffs : & [Complex < f64 >]) -> Self
pub fn sub (& self , other : & Self) -> Self
pub fn trim (& self , tol : f64) -> FerrayResult < Self >
pub fn truncate (& self , size : usize) -> FerrayResult < Self >
pub struct PolynomialF32

pub fn truncate (& self , size : usize) -> FerrayResult < Self >

pub fn with_window (mut self , window : [f32 ; 2]) -> FerrayResult < Self >
